questions.q: The Great Wall of China was built primarily to serve what purpose?
Which mountain is the tallest in the world?
Which country is home to the Statue of Liberty?
In which country would you find the Colosseum?
Which country is famous for its pyramids and ancient history?
Which Mediterranean island is an independent country closest to mainland Africa?
The ancient Nabataean city of Petra, carved into rose-colored stone, is located in which modern-day country?
Which South American country is home to the world's largest salt flat, the Salar de Uyuni?
Which Asian country is the world's largest exporter of vanilla, producing nearly 60% of the global supply?
The Waitomo Caves in New Zealand are famous for their displays of what bioluminescent organism?
Which Norwegian fjord is recognized as the longest and deepest fjord in Norway, extending approximately 205 kilometers inland?
The Socotra Archipelago, known for its unique endemic vegetation, belongs to which Middle Eastern nation?
Which country contains the majority of the world's remaining lowland rainforests outside of the Amazon Basin?
The ancient trade route known as the Silk Road primarily connected China with which Mediterranean region?
choices: The Levant and beyond to Rome

questions.q: Lake Baikal in Russia holds what distinction among the world's freshwater lakes?
choices: Greatest depth and largest volume of freshwater

questions.q: Which Southeast Asian country comprises over 17,000 islands and is the world's largest archipelago by number of islands?
The Atacama Large Millimeter Array observatory is located in which country's desert, making it ideal for astronomical observations?
Which African country is home to the Okavango Delta, one of the world's largest inland delta systems?
The ancient Nabob kingdom and its rock-cut temples can be found primarily in which region of India?
Which Balkan country was the first to declare independence from Yugoslavia, triggering a series of wars in the 1990s?
The geothermal hot springs region of Rotorua is located on which tectonic feature of New Zealand's North Island?
Which Central Asian country was historically the center of the Timurid Empire and contains the city of Samarkand with its famous Registan square?
The Plitvice Lakes National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage site featuring cascading lakes and waterfalls, is located in which European country?
Mount Kilimanjaro, Africa's highest peak, is located in which East African country?
Which European capital city is located on both the European and Asian continents?
The ancient city of Petra, known for its rose-colored rock structures, is located in which country?
Which Southeast Asian country has the most islands, with over 17,000?
The Atacama Desert, one of the driest places on Earth, is primarily located in which country?
Which city served as the capital of the Ottoman Empire before Istanbul?
The Colosseum is located in which Italian city?
Which country is home to the majority of the world's fjords?
Which Scandinavian country is home to the Northern Lights most frequently visible from its territory?
The Parthenon, an ancient Greek temple, stands on a hilltop in which city?
Which African country has Victoria Falls on its border with Zambia?
The Sagrada Familia basilica under construction is located in which Spanish city?
Which Asian country is famous for its extensive system of canals and is often called the 'Venice of Asia'?
The ancient Roman ruins of Pompeii are located near which Italian city?
Which country is home to the ancient wonder of the world known as the Hanging Gardens, historically believed to be located there?
The Grand Canyon is primarily located in which U.S. state?
Which European country is landlocked and shares borders with eight countries, including Austria and Czech Republic?
The Blue Mosque, famous for its blue tilework, is located in which city?
